briefdescription.para: Resets the object pointer so that we know not to call methods of this object any more. @SINCE_1_0.0.
Constructor for function with static linkage.

This function template gets instantiated at the call site. @SINCE_1_9.33

args

@SINCE_1_0.0
object
The object to call (not owned)

dispatcher
